metadata.description: AI skills for teaching and learning at the McCombs School of Business, UT Austin. Maintained by the AI Faculty Working Group.

plugins.name: mccombs-case-toolkit
plugins.description: Case-based teaching lifecycle: ideation, case writing, fact-checking, teaching notes, exercises, slides, and refreshes — all McCombs-branded.

plugins.name: business-ai-tools
plugins.description: Skills by Prof. Ben Bentzin (McCombs): AI Council decision review, academic and general summarizers, and Beamer slide generation. MIT licensed.
